Package io.xlorey.FluxLoader.client.fonts

Class FontAwesomeIcons

java.lang.Object
io.xlorey.FluxLoader.client.fonts.FontAwesomeIcons
public class FontAwesomeIcons extends Object
Font Awesome icons codepoints, can be used to render icons with imgui in any place where text can be rendered.

  • Field Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final short[]
    _IconRange
    An array representing the range of code points used for FontAwesome icons.
    static final short
    _IconRangeMax
    Maximum code point in FontAwesome icon range.
    static final short
    _IconRangeMin
    Minimum code point in FontAwesome icon range.

  • Field Details

    • _IconRangeMin

      public static final short _IconRangeMin
      Minimum code point in FontAwesome icon range.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • _IconRangeMax

      public static final short _IconRangeMax
      Maximum code point in FontAwesome icon range.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • _IconRange

      public static final short[] _IconRange
      An array representing the range of code points used for FontAwesome icons. Includes minimum and maximum values, plus a trailing zero to indicate the end of the range.
